missingScenarioTitles: Verify system handles undefined or gibberish input gracefully
Verify system does not crash when receiving random alphanumeric gibberish input

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify system handles undefined or gibberish input gracefully
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Inputting a string and asserting a validation message is a stable, deterministic UI interaction easily handled by Playwright.

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify system does not crash when receiving random alphanumeric gibberish input
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright can capture console errors and intercept network responses to assert no crash conditions occur when gibberish input is submitted.

selectedMissingTestsForGeneration.title: Verify system handles undefined or gibberish input gracefully
selectedMissingTestsForGeneration.reason: Inputting a string and asserting a validation message is a stable, deterministic UI interaction easily handled by Playwright.

selectedMissingTestsForGeneration.title: Verify system does not crash when receiving random alphanumeric gibberish input
selectedMissingTestsForGeneration.reason: Playwright can capture console errors and intercept network responses to assert no crash conditions occur when gibberish input is submitted.

skippedManualOnlyTests.title: Verify system sanitizes gibberish input to prevent injection attacks
skippedManualOnlyTests.reason: Security sanitization validation often requires manual inspection of response payloads and server behavior; full security validation typically requires dedicated security tooling beyond Playwright's scope.

skippedManualOnlyTests.title: Verify user receives a clear and user-friendly error message for unrecognized input
skippedManualOnlyTests.reason: Usability and tone-of-voice validation of error messages require human judgment and cannot be reliably automated with Playwright alone.

skippedManualOnlyTests.title: Verify accessibility of the error state triggered by gibberish input
skippedManualOnlyTests.reason: Full accessibility validation including screen reader announcements requires manual testing with assistive technologies; automated tools can only partially cover ARIA attribute checks.
